title: Joni's Short Swords
description: A set of shorter Vanilla-style swords
body:
![Joni's Short Swords Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b770654bbce3a44be4832f92dc1acc6d263c6b3.png)

# Short Swords for Minecraft 1.21.9 - 1.21.11 ✨
 
**Joni’s Short Swords** replaces the default swords with _shorter_, _vanilla-style_ versions to improve visibility while keeping the classic Minecraft look.

> The shorter models take up less space on the screen, making it easier to see what’s happening in front of you. Especially useful for PvP players who want a clearer view during fights.
